encounters.name: Initial Assault
encounters.tactics: Goblins fight erratically. One climbs a table for higher ground, another gets distracted by food, a third grabs a carving knife.
encounters.description: As Father Zantus begins the consecration speech, a thunderstone crack signals the goblin attack. Three goblins emerge from hiding to attack the festival-goers.
encounters.mapNotes: Takes place in the main cathedral square with tables and audience members providing cover and obstacles.

encounters.name: Goblin Pyros
encounters.tactics: Goblins are dancing and cackle around the blazing bonfire cart. They attempt to set additional fires and will fight to protect the flames.
encounters.description: A cart laden with fuel for the evening bonfire has been set ablaze by a group of goblins. They dance and cackle around the blazing cart as townspeople flee in terror.
encounters.mapNotes: Burning cart provides 20-foot radius difficult terrain due to heat. The cart itself is a moveable obstacle.

encounters.name: The Goblin Raider
encounters.tactics: Aldern plays at being a hero, trying to impress the townspeople while his goblin allies harass civilians.
encounters.description: A mounted human noble charges about the streets on horseback, accompanied by goblin warriors. He seems to be acting heroically, but his companions are causing chaos.
encounters.mapNotes: Takes place in town streets. Horse provides 10-foot reach advantage.

encounters.name: The Desecrated Vault
encounters.tactics: Skeletons attack immediately when vault is opened.
encounters.description: Father Tobyn's vault has been desecrated. Two skeletal remains guard the chamber, recently animated.
encounters.mapNotes: Small underground chamber, 10x10 feet. Tombstones and caskets provide minor cover.

encounters.name: The Boar Hunt

enemies.name: Wild Boar
specialAbilities: Ferocity (continue fighting when reduced to 0 hp)

encounters.tactics: Boars charge PCs and gore repeatedly. They target single opponents.
encounters.description: A hunting party discovers two wild boars in the forest. The creatures are territorial and immediately aggressive.
encounters.mapNotes: Dense forest terrain provides 20% concealment and 3/4 cover from trees.

encounters.name: Monster in the Closet
encounters.tactics: Goblin bursts from hiding and attacks with surprise. Attempts to flee if outnumbered.
encounters.description: A single goblin has hidden in a closet, traumatizing the Barrett family.
encounters.mapNotes: Confined house interior. Goblin gains +2 on surprise round.

encounters.name: Against the Goblins - Glassworks Invasion
encounters.tactics: Tsuto coordinates goblin attacks and uses superior mobility. He attempts to flank and trip enemies. Goblins stay in groups of 2-3.
encounters.description: Lonjiku Kaijitsu's workers have been killed and replaced with goblins under Tsuto's command. The glassworks is now a goblin stronghold.
encounters.mapNotes: Large workshop with furnaces (treat as damaging terrain), glass vats, and work tables providing cover.

encounters.name: B1 - Guard Cave
encounters.tactics: Sinspawn attacks in melee and attempts to grab and tear opponents.
encounters.description: A twisted creature, bound by ancient magic, guards the entrance to the deeper catacombs.
encounters.mapNotes: Cave entrance, 20x20 feet. Stone formations provide partial cover.

encounters.name: B4 - Washing Pool
encounters.tactics: Vargouille uses hit-and-run tactics, flying above ground level and swooping for bites.
encounters.description: An ancient guardian creature still lurks in these forgotten halls, commanded by the Scribbler centuries ago.
encounters.mapNotes: Underground pool chamber with 20-foot ceiling. Water provides concealment.

encounters.name: B6 - Ancient Prison
encounters.tactics: Both sinspawn attack simultaneously from different angles, attempting to flank and rend.
encounters.description: Two sinspawn guard the inner sanctum of the catacombs, protecting the runewell.
encounters.mapNotes: Large prison chamber, 30x40 feet. Ancient bars provide cover. Runewell in center.

encounters.name: B9 - Prisoner Pits
encounters.tactics: Zombies shuffle toward PCs and attempt to grab and drag them into the pits. One zombie has a symbiont worm.
encounters.description: Three zombie prisoners shuffle about in deep pits, ancient creatures left over from Thassilonian times.
encounters.mapNotes: Pit chambers, 20x15 feet each. Pits are 20 feet deep. Zombies take -4 on ability checks to climb.

encounters.name: B13 - Cathedral of Wrath
encounters.location: Catacombs of Wrath - Cathedral of Wrath
encounters.treasure: Unholy symbol, potion of cure serious wounds
encounters.tactics: Erylium uses dimension door for mobility and spellcasting from range. She summons allies and uses area effects.
encounters.description: Erylium, a quasit demon, has corrupted this ancient cathedral and bound herself to the Wrath runewell.
encounters.mapNotes: Cathedral, 40x50 feet with 30-foot ceiling. Runewell at center. Pillars provide cover.

encounters.name: C5 - Goblin Dog Kennel
encounters.tactics: Goblin dogs attack in a pack, attempting to trip and flank opponents.
encounters.description: Four trained goblin dogs guard the kennel area, vicious beasts that serve Ripnugget.
encounters.mapNotes: Kennel, 30x30 feet. Cages and posts provide cover.

encounters.name: C6 - Tangletooth's Den
encounters.tactics: Tangletooth pounces on the first opponent, raking and attempting to pin. Uses furniture as jumping points.
encounters.description: Gogmurt's animal companion, a firepelt cougar, guards his master's den.
encounters.mapNotes: Den, 25x25 feet. Vegetation and rough terrain provide concealment.

encounters.name: C9 - Rope Bridge
encounters.tactics: Goblins fight from the bridge and attempt to push opponents over the 40-foot drop.
encounters.description: The rope bridge to Thistletop is defended by a contingent of goblin warriors and commandos.
encounters.mapNotes: Rope bridge, 60 feet long, 5 feet wide. 40-foot fall to water below. Bridge sways and provides concealment.

encounters.name: C10 - Thistletop
encounters.tactics: Ripnugget fights alongside his warriors, using hit-and-run tactics. Warriors form defensive lines.
encounters.description: Ripnugget and his elite goblin guard hold the main fortress of Thistletop.
encounters.mapNotes: Fortified structure, 40x50 feet. Multiple levels with stairs. Balconies provide firing platforms.

encounters.name: C19 - Throne Room
encounters.treasure: Unholy Scimitar +1, Amulet of natural armor +1, jewelry (200 gp)
encounters.tactics: Nualia fights to the death, using Orik as a distraction. She calls upon dark powers. Orik attempts to flank and uses ranged attacks.
encounters.description: Nualia sits upon her makeshift throne, her half-demon heritage becoming apparent. Orik Tander, her war-scarred lieutenant, stands at her side.
encounters.mapNotes: Throne room, 30x40 feet. Nualia's throne at north end. Orik positions himself at the door.

encounters.name: E10 - Malfeshnekor's Prison
encounters.tactics: Malfeshnekor uses his regeneration and fire immunity to his advantage. He summons lesser barghests and uses spell-like abilities.
encounters.description: An imprisoned barghest of terrible power, bound here by ancient Thassilonian magic. Its hunger threatens to consume all of Sandpoint.
encounters.mapNotes: Prison chamber, 50x50 feet. Magical chains bind the creature. Runes cover the walls.

encounters.name: Meeting the Patient
encounters.tactics: Aldern is torn between his affection for the party and his sickness. He may attempt to infect them before fleeing.
encounters.description: Aldern Foxglove, scarred and sick, confronts the party outside his family manor.
encounters.mapNotes: Manor grounds, open area with 100+ feet of space.

encounters.name: The Necromancer
encounters.tactics: Caizarlu uses paralysis touch to disable threats while zombies shamble forward. Ghast attempts to flank.
encounters.description: One-eared Caizarlu, an undead ghast and servant of the Skinsaw Murders, has animated corpses in the manor's depths.
encounters.mapNotes: Manor cellar, 30x40 feet. Rotting furniture provides cover. Stench fills the area.

encounters.name: B15 - Master Bedroom
encounters.tactics: Iesha's ghost attempts to communicate but her anguish makes her dangerous. She may attack blindly.
encounters.description: The tortured spirit of Iesha Foxglove manifests in the master bedroom, driven to madness by betrayal and murder.
encounters.mapNotes: Bedroom, 25x30 feet. Bed, furniture, and mold-covered walls. Temperature drops when ghost manifests.

encounters.name: D3 - The Undermill
encounters.tactics: Cultists form a group and cast defensive spells before engaging. Leader uses ranged support and healing.
encounters.description: The Skinsaw Cult has established a cult headquarters in the Sandpoint Sawmill's lower levels.
encounters.mapNotes: Mill, 40x50 feet. Sawblades provide hazardous terrain. Logs and machinery create obstacles.

encounters.name: E4 - Clock Tower Rookery
encounters.treasure: Rapier +1, Cloak of elvenkind, magical amulet, 300 gp
encounters.tactics: Xanesha uses invisibility and ranged spells from distance. She attempts to dominate opponents using her supernatural abilities.
encounters.description: Xanesha, a lamia and orchestrator of the Skinsaw Murders, commands the cult from her tower lair.
encounters.mapNotes: Clock tower, 20x20 feet with 40-foot ceiling. Bells provide cover. Windows overlook the town.

encounters.name: Graul Farm Combat
encounters.treasure: Ogre hook, greatclubs, 600 gp, treasure hoard (1200 gp)
encounters.tactics: Mammy Graul wades into combat with her hook, attempting to knock down opponents. Ogres coordinate attacks.
encounters.description: Mammy Graul and her monstrous sons defend their farm stronghold against intruders.
encounters.mapNotes: Farm compound, 60x80 feet. Farmhouse, barn, and fenced areas provide cover and obstacles.

encounters.name: Fort Rannick - Old Guard Post
encounters.tactics: Stone giants fight in formation, using rock throws to damage at range. Overseer attempts to crush smaller foes.
encounters.description: Stone giants have taken control of Fort Rannick's upper levels, establishing a military position.
encounters.mapNotes: Fort structure, 50x50 feet per chamber. 15-foot ceilings accommodate giants. Fortifications provide cover.

encounters.name: Black Magga Rising
encounters.treasure: Treasure hoard in lair, 2000+ gp worth
encounters.tactics: Black Magga uses her multiple heads to make coordinated attacks, regenerating bitten heads. She attempts to engulf smaller foes.
encounters.description: An ancient, massive hydra emerges from the Storval Deep, a truly catastrophic threat.
encounters.mapNotes: Deep water environment. Hydra fills much of the space. Cliffs and rock formations provide minimal cover.

encounters.name: Fort Rannick - Commander's Quarters
encounters.tactics: Jaagrath commands from the center, using strategic positioning. Giants attempt to control the fight with ranged attacks.
encounters.description: Jaagrath Kreeg, a powerful ogre warlord, commands the stone giant forces from Fort Rannick.
encounters.mapNotes: Commander's quarters, 30x40 feet. War table, maps, and equipment provide cover.

encounters.name: Jorgenfist Approach
encounters.tactics: Giants form a patrol line and use rocks as primary weapon before closing to melee.
encounters.description: Stone giant patrols guard the approaches to Jorgenfist.
encounters.mapNotes: Open plateau terrain. Rocky outcroppings provide cover.

encounters.name: A6 - The Stone Gate
encounters.tactics: Elemental attempts to engulf and grapple. It uses terrain to its advantage.
encounters.description: A massive earth elemental guards the main gate to Jorgenfist.
encounters.mapNotes: Gate chamber, 40x50 feet. Solid stone walls. Elemental can merge with stone.

encounters.name: B4 - The Great Cave of Jorgenfist

enemies.name: Galenmir the Remorhaz
specialAbilities: Heat (2d6 fire damage to anything nearby)

encounters.tactics: Remorhaz burrows beneath combatants and erupts to attack. Uses heat to damage nearby enemies.
encounters.description: A massive, fire-breathing remorhaz dwells in the great cave of Jorgenfist.
encounters.mapNotes: Great cave, 60x80 feet. Sandy/rocky floor allows burrowing. Stalactites provide minor cover.

encounters.name: B11 - Chamber of the Sihedron
encounters.tactics: Enga uses magic resistance and spell-like abilities from range. She polymorphs or turns invisible to avoid damage.
encounters.description: Enga, an ogre mage of considerable power, commands the Sihedron chamber.
encounters.mapNotes: Chamber, 40x50 feet. Ancient altar at center. Magical runes cover walls.

encounters.name: B14 - Tyrant Trolls
encounters.tactics: Trolls attack with vicious rending attacks and regenerate damage. They attempt to isolate and tear apart opponents.
encounters.description: Two ancient trolls, scarred from ages of battle, guard the inner vaults.
encounters.mapNotes: Cavern, 50x60 feet. Bloodstained rock, bones scattered about.

encounters.name: Mokmurian Confrontation
encounters.treasure: Greatclub +1, Dragon armor +2, Ring of protection, 1000 gp
encounters.tactics: Mokmurian uses ranged spells and area effects while maintaining distance. He casts defensive spells before melee.
encounters.description: Mokmurian, a stone giant sorcerer of terrible power, directs the entire assault on Varisia.
encounters.mapNotes: Sanctum, 40x50 feet. Pillars for cover. Magical focus items at cardinal points.

encounters.name: The Scribbler's Guardians
encounters.tactics: The Scribbler uses reality-warping and madness effects. It summons servants and uses area effects.
encounters.description: The Scribbler, an ancient entity of madness and chaos, still lingers in Hook Mountain.
encounters.mapNotes: Reality is twisted here. Terrain and laws of physics are unreliable.

encounters.name: Azaven's Resurrection
encounters.treasure: Phylactery, magical robes, ring of protection +2, 800 gp
encounters.tactics: Xyoddin uses ranged spells and paralyzing touch while maintaining distance. Phylactery is hidden.
encounters.description: Xyoddin, an ancient lich, has preserved his master Azaven's remains.
encounters.mapNotes: Crypt chamber, 50x60 feet. Tombs and sarcophagi provide cover. Phylactery hidden in chamber.

encounters.name: Mustard Jelly Swarm

enemies.name: Mustard Jelly
specialAbilities: Energy absorption (immune to electricity, heals from it)

encounters.tactics: Mustard jelly uses constriction and engulfing attacks. It moves toward electrical sources.
encounters.description: A massive, acidic ooze creature guards the befouled chamber deep underground.
encounters.mapNotes: Underground chamber, 40x50 feet. Moisture-laden walls. Pools of acidic fluid.

encounters.name: Xin's Stairway
encounters.tactics: Wyvern uses aerial advantage, diving and striking with stinging tail.
encounters.description: A massive wyvern guards the stairway to the lost city of Xin-Shalast.
encounters.mapNotes: Mountainside stairway, 200+ feet elevation change. Cliff terrain provides hazards.

encounters.name: Shrine of Monsters and Madness
encounters.tactics: Queen uses domination and charm spells. Cultists coordinate attacks from range.
encounters.description: The Shrine contains a cult dedicated to monsters and madness, protecting Karzoug's inner sanctum.
encounters.mapNotes: Shrine chamber, 50x60 feet. Altars and ritual circles provide cover and magical hazards.

encounters.name: Crypts of the Builders
encounters.tactics: Golems attack methodically and coordinate movements.
encounters.description: Ancient stone golems guard the crypts of the ancient builders of Xin-Shalast.
encounters.mapNotes: Crypt chamber, 60x70 feet. Sarcophagi and pillars provide cover.

encounters.name: Karzoug's Ascension
encounters.treasure: Scourge of Shalast, Robes of Thassilonian power, Ring of wizardry, Cloak of resistance +5, 5000+ gp
encounters.tactics: Karzoug uses mythic spellcasting, combat maneuvers, and reality-bending magic. Uses minions and summons.
encounters.description: Karzoug, the ancient Thassilonian war-mage and god of the age, has finally returned to claim dominion over Varisia.
encounters.mapNotes: The Pinnacle of Xin-Shalast, 80x80 feet with 100-foot ceilings. Magical wards and hazards fill the chamber. Ancient magic permeates everything.
